mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.05) across 100+ rate cut observations, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.4 percentage points within a single month signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns as recession fears dominate pricing.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction during historical unemployment spikes.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter through earnings revision cycles.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over any 5-year rolling window, or housing starts and retail sales diverge without affecting equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production below zero signals supply-side contraction, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week as corporate output expectations fall.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of negative INDPRO growth months during tightening periods, or the signal loses predictive power when inflation exceeds 3%.

mechanism_narrative: A declining inflation rate combined with a stable or falling federal funds rate confirms disinflation without recession, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns as valuation multiples expand.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of observations, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all disinflation episodes since 2000.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month declines in total nonfarm payrolls directly reduce aggregate income and corporate revenue expectations, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive direction in > 55% of negative payroll months, or the signal out-of-sample accuracy drops below 45% in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly real GDP growth exceeding 2.5 percent confirms robust economic expansion, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week as earnings forecasts are upgraded.
failure_condition: SPX delivers negative 5d returns in > 60% of high-GDP quarters, or the threshold fails to separate positive from negative return periods in historical backtests.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent weakness in industrial production and rising unemployment during a liquidity crunch signals a hard landing, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns as risk premiums spike.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields positive 20d returns in > 50% of stress episodes, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in multivariate regressions over 10-year samples.
